title: Create timers tree module in wtf-storage/src/timers.rs
description: Create the timers.rs module with TimerData struct, key encoding helpers, and tree configuration per ADR-007
acceptance_criteria: TimerData struct with invocation_id: String, seq: u32, fire_at: i64
encode_timer_key(invocation_id, seq) -> Vec<u8> for key encoding

title: Implement schedule_timer function
description: Add a timer to the TIMERS tree with fire_at timestamp
acceptance_criteria: schedule_timer(db: &sled::Db, invocation_id: &str, seq: u32, fire_at: i64) -> Result<()>

title: Implement cancel_timer function
description: Remove a timer from the TIMERS tree
acceptance_criteria: Returns true if timer was found and removed
Returns false if timer did not exist

title: Implement get_expired_timers function
description: Scan all timers and return those where fire_at <= now, sorted by fire_at
acceptance_criteria: Scans all entries in TIMERS tree
Returns sorted by fire_at ascending (oldest first)

title: Implement get_next_timer_fire_at function
description: Get the earliest timer fire_at for sleep optimization
acceptance_criteria: Returns None if no timers exist
Uses iter().next() after finding min by fire_at

title: Implement delete_timers function for cleanup
description: Delete a batch of expired timers after processing
acceptance_criteria: Removes each timer by invocation_id:seq key

title: Add unit tests for timer functions
description: Test schedule, cancel, get_expired, and get_next_timer_fire_at
acceptance_criteria: Test cancel_timer returns false for missing timer
